overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring a foggy Victorian-era city at night. The character transitions from interior spaces to cobblestone streets, passing historic buildings with gas lighting and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone building entrance with arched doorway

events.description: character approaches the wooden door and reaches for the handle
character opens door and steps inside the building

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone building entrance and opening the wooden door to enter the interior

entered.detail: tall stone facade with arched windows and decorative masonry
large stone arch framing the entrance door
dark wooden double door with metal fixtures
short stone staircase leading to the entrance
decorative stone planter flanking the entrance steps

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a historic stone building at night, walking up the steps to a large wooden door. The foggy exterior is dimly lit by warm artificial light from within, highlighting the arched entryway and decorative stonework.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian interior with fireplaces and antique furniture

events.description: character passes close to a lit fireplace, casting warm orange light on the scene
character turns toward the back of the room, heading for the exit door

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit interior rooms, passing fireplaces and furniture while heading toward the back exit

entered.detail: burning fireplace with orange flames illuminating the room
dark polished wooden flooring throughout the interior
ornate metal chandelier hanging from the ceiling
large wooden table with chairs in the center of the room
upholstered armchair near the fireplace
doorway leading to the rear of the building

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the character moves through dark rooms illuminated by fireplace glow and chandeliers. The space features wooden floors, antique furniture, and a warm atmosphere contrasting with the foggy exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear courtyard with tavern entrance and burning barrels

events.description: character drops down from the doorway ledge to the lower courtyard level
character enters the open courtyard area with the Flying Horse tavern visible ahead

agents.ego_description: exiting through the back door, dropping down to a lower courtyard, and approaching the Flying Horse tavern through fog

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'FLYING HORSE' above the tavern entrance
two-story building with warm light emanating from windows
metal barrel with fire providing heat and light in the courtyard
simple wooden seating near the tavern entrance
archway leading from the courtyard to the street beyond

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building into a foggy rear courtyard, dropping down to a lower level. The Flying Horse tavern stands ahead with its illuminated sign, while a burning barrel provides warmth in the damp courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy Victorian street with newspaper building and plaza

events.description: passing through stone archway into the open plaza with the Free Press building
character turns right around the fountain, navigating the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through foggy cobblestone streets, passing under archways and navigating the open plaza with the Free Press building

entered.detail: multi-story building with large signage reading 'THE FREE PRESS'
circular stone fountain in the center of the plaza
Victorian-style street lamp casting warm light through the fog
construction scaffolding along the building facade
string of triangular flags hanging across the street

segments.scene_description: Moving through the foggy streets, the character enters an open plaza dominated by the Free Press building. The area features a central stone fountain, decorative bunting, and scaffolding, all illuminated by gas lamps piercing through the thick fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with furniture store and wanted posters

events.description: character approaches the Harrison & Barrow building, slowing to look at signage
passing under a bright gas lamp casting strong warm light on the character

agents.ego_description: continuing through the foggy cobblestone streets, approaching the Harrison & Barrow furniture store and examining wanted posters on the walls

entered.detail: large painted sign reading 'HARRISON & BARROW FURNITURES' on brick wall
tall brick building with multiple windows and architectural details
stacked wooden barrels along the sidewalk
wall plastered with old wanted posters and notices
bare tree silhouetted against the foggy background

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the historic district, approaching the Harrison & Barrow furniture store. The street features red brick buildings, wooden barrels, and walls covered in wanted posters, all bathed in the warm glow of gas lamps cutting through the persistent fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate interior of a historic building into the expansive, fog-shrouded streets of a Victorian district. It begins with the character ascending the stone steps of a dimly lit entryway before moving inside, where the cold exterior fog is replaced by the warm glow of fireplaces and chandeliers reflecting off antique furniture. The scene then shifts as the character exits through a rear courtyard, dropping down toward a burning barrel and the illuminated sign of the Flying Horse tavern. As the camera pushes forward into the damp night, the environment opens into a wide plaza featuring a stone fountain and the Free Press building under the flicker of gas lamps. Finally, the path leads deeper into the historic district, passing red brick walls adorned with wanted posters as the character approaches the Harrison & Barrow furniture store.
